## Summary

All three features implemented, clean build, committed and pushed.

### Feature 1: Minimap (`hud.ts`)
- 130px square overlay in the **top-right corner**, positioned below the timer
- Semi-transparent dark background with a light border
- Renders explored tiles in two shades (visible = tan `#8a7a58`, explored-dim = `#4a4232`) consistent with the main fog-of-war system — uses the existing `isTileExplored`/`isTileVisible` helpers
